safe_wording: This pack is safe only as a controlled article-method workflow test. It can describe the article's argument, but it cannot support external factual claims without more sources.
unresolved_risk: Needs human review and external source records before being used as a publication evidence pack.

safe_wording: The pack can now say it includes one official external source on household cost pressures. It still cannot support the whole TWIS article without further source work.
unresolved_risk: Needs human review and more external sources before use as a publication evidence pack.
